translationGuidelines: Keep this file as a shell that delegates to feature modules.
Do not absorb repository or screen-specific logic here.
Preserve home/history bottom bar plus cart action visibility semantics.
Startup logic should read persisted session state and decide onboarding vs home before normal route rendering.
Keep persistent login state separate from fake catalogue content.
Expose stream-like update surfaces so UI refresh remains immediate after mutations.
Split catalog, restaurant, and helper logic into focused files rather than one giant data source translation.
Preserve onboarding sequencing and transition into login.
Preserve hard-coded credential check, snackbar error, and successful navigation to home after session toggle.
Preserve section order, conditional favourites block, and restaurant selection path into detail state.
Preserve tabs plus liked restaurant selection into detail route.
Preserve expandable recommended, non-veg, and veg sections and cart action visibility when total count is non-zero.
Keep item filtering, coupon, delivery, and bill sections modular; do not fold them into the root page file.
Preserve logout to onboarding and keep current placeholder cards explicit rather than silently omitted.
Avoid hard-coded English labels for migrated UI text.

rules: Migrate all user-visible source strings, especially onboarding, login, navigation, cart, detail, profile, and placeholder labels.
Keep resource ids stable enough for later matrix evidence and tests.
Carry over primary/neutral accents that drive onboarding, top bars, and cards.
Map status/navigation bar styling intent into HarmonyOS page/theme composition where available.
Copy raster assets directly when valid.
Convert icon/vector/state resources into HarmonyOS-friendly media or state code without losing semantic role.

dependencies.replacementStrategy: Use current HarmonyOS route/page shell under `app/` and feature pages instead of Android Navigation Compose.
Replace with HarmonyOS-compatible preferences/storage service for persisted login state.
Replace with HarmonyOS pager/swiper equivalent or custom lightweight pager behavior for onboarding and history tabs.
Use idiomatic Cangjie composition/service wiring rather than Android Hilt injection APIs.
Use HarmonyOS startup page/loading gate behavior around persisted session lookup.

tests.name: source-example-unit-test
tests.strategy: Do not migrate as meaningful business coverage; replace with focused target tests for actual app behavior.

tests.name: source-example-instrumented-test
tests.strategy: Do not rely on package-name smoke test; replace with focused target-side verification and manual route smoke where harness is limited.

tests.name: startup-session-tests
tests.strategy: Add focused target tests for start destination selection and persisted session toggling.

tests.name: login-validation-tests
tests.strategy: Add focused target tests for accepted credentials, rejected credentials, and emitted error state/snackbar model.

tests.name: repository-refresh-tests
tests.strategy: Add focused target tests for selected restaurant propagation, menu retrieval, liked restaurant stream refresh, and cart item read behavior.

tests.name: detail-cart-state-tests
tests.strategy: Add focused target tests for section toggles, menu partitioning, cart visibility rules, and summary helpers.

phases.title: Project skeleton and resources
targetScope: Stabilize root app shell and route map.
Raise string/color/media resource parity before behavior-heavy phases.
Prevent broad shell files from absorbing unrelated future behavior.
expectedTests: resource key/manual review of migrated strings and media references
stateDataBehavior: Route ids and screen titles must stay resource-backed.
Shell pages should stay thin so later state/data modules own business behavior.
deferredRisks: String/media parity remains incomplete if phase 01 is rushed.
Further expansion in bootstrap shell risks later evidence concentration.

implementationGroups.title: Route shell and resource baseline
uiContracts: route inventory: onboarding, login_screen, home_screen, history, cart, profile, restaurant_details
requiredBehaviors: Preserve canonical route names and screen labels.
Ensure current target shell remains a composition surface rather than business-logic sink.
riskHints: Current target string coverage is only partial.
Target shell concentration already exists in bootstrap_page.cj.
acceptanceEvidence: manual review of resource coverage deltas

phases.title: Startup, session persistence, navigation, and shared data contracts
targetScope: Implement startup route decision from persisted login state.
Implement shared session, selected restaurant, liked restaurant, and cart data contracts.
Implement route shell behavior and bottom bar/cart action rules.
stateDataBehavior: Preserve splash-gated startup selection between onboarding and home.
Preserve immediate UI refresh after login state toggle and selected restaurant writes.
Preserve bottom bar visibility limited to home/history and state-sensitive cart action visibility.
deferredRisks: HarmonyOS persistence API choice may require capability validation before closure.
Seed-reported runtime permission/platform-component scope may narrow after implementation inspection.

implementationGroups.title: Startup routing and splash gate
uiContracts: startup route chosen before normal navigation shell
requiredBehaviors: Home start when login state is true.
Onboarding start when login state is false.
Loading gate clears only after start destination is resolved.
riskHints: Source uses blocking Flow read in startup; target should preserve user-visible gating without unnecessary shell coupling.
acceptanceEvidence: focused startup session test pass or compile pass

implementationGroups.title: Session and selection repositories
requiredBehaviors: Repository reads provide ads, food, and restaurants for home UI.
Selected restaurant write must be observable by detail/history/cart flows.
Session toggle persists across startup.
riskHints: Source fake repositories are simple but UI relies on their immediate emission semantics.

implementationGroups.title: Navigation shell and bottom bar rules
uiContracts: home and history show bottom bar when scroll position is at top
cart action sits above bottom bar
requiredBehaviors: Route transitions preserve single-top style semantics where practical.
Bottom bar is not shown on onboarding, login, detail, cart, or profile surfaces.
riskHints: Do not overfit Android Nav APIs; preserve user-visible routing behavior only.

phases.title: Onboarding and login flow
targetScope: Migrate onboarding pager and page content.
Migrate login form state, validation, snackbar/error model, and successful session handoff.
stateDataBehavior: Onboarding current page state advances through all pages then routes to login.
Login text field state updates immediately as user types.
Invalid credentials trigger visible error state/snackbar.
Successful login toggles session state and routes to home.
deferredRisks: Pager API may need a target replacement rather than one-to-one library parity.
Social login buttons remain product placeholders unless product direction changes.

implementationGroups.title: Onboarding pager and page content
requiredBehaviors: Sequential page progression.
Final action navigates to login.
riskHints: Seed over-detects image-viewer behavior here; likely static onboarding media only.

implementationGroups.title: Login validation and session handoff
uiContracts: two text fields plus login button and social placeholder actions
requiredBehaviors: Accepted credentials are `abcxyz@gmail.com` and `abcdef`.
Rejected credentials emit a visible error message.
Successful login clears back stack semantics into home where practical.
riskHints: Source uses hard-coded credentials and placeholder social actions; preserve current UX rather than inventing backend auth.

phases.title: Home and history discovery flows
targetScope: Migrate home discovery feed and search/filter surfaces.
Migrate favourites/history route and detail selection behavior.
stateDataBehavior: Home state populates ads, food, restaurant, and liked restaurant sections from repositories.
Selecting a restaurant writes shared state before navigation.
Favourite/history surfaces refresh immediately from liked restaurant stream.
Search and filter affordances remain visible and stateful.
deferredRisks: Search/filter semantics may require explicit target helpers because source uses local mutable state in widgets.
History tab pager replacement must preserve visible tab switching.

implementationGroups.title: Home feed, search, favourites, and selection
uiContracts: home section order: top, greeting, search, ads, recommended foods, favourites, chips, restaurant list, thank you
requiredBehaviors: Home screen renders all sections from repository-backed state.
Favourite section is conditional on non-empty liked list.
Restaurant selection updates shared selection and navigates to detail.
riskHints: Current target home page is already a concentration risk; keep extracted widgets and helpers.

implementationGroups.title: History tabs and liked restaurant flow
uiContracts: search bar plus tabs over liked restaurant content
requiredBehaviors: Liked list renders from shared repository stream.
Selecting a restaurant writes selection then navigates to detail.
riskHints: Source uses pager tabs; target should preserve visible switching even with a different implementation.

phases.title: Detail and cart mutation flows
targetScope: Migrate detail page selection display, menu grouping, toggles, like state, and cart shortcut.
Migrate cart page item list, coupon, delivery, and bill sections.
stateDataBehavior: Detail screen consumes selected restaurant and menu/cart streams from shared repository state.
Recommended, non-veg, and veg sections preserve independent expansion state.
Like toggle updates visible state immediately.
Cart page filters out zero-count items and keeps summary sections visible.
deferredRisks: Source cart increment/decrement callbacks are placeholders; target needs a documented parity decision on mutation depth.
Share action remains placeholder unless product specifies outbound sharing UX.

implementationGroups.title: Detail state, menu grouping, and toggles
uiContracts: restaurant card followed by expandable menu sections
floating cart action when menu count sum is non-zero
requiredBehaviors: Menu list partitions into recommended, veg, and non-veg views.
Expansion toggles update immediately without leaving the page.
Selected restaurant details render from shared state rather than route-only stubs.
riskHints: Seed may overstate file access/image viewer capability from static resource usage; confirm before closing capability rows.

implementationGroups.title: Cart summary and mutation surfaces
uiContracts: item list, coupon bar, delivery section, bill section
requiredBehaviors: Zero-count items are hidden from the rendered list.
Coupon, delivery, and bill sections remain visible.
Mutation affordances must not be silently removed even if source callbacks are placeholders.
riskHints: Source cart mutation callbacks are empty; parity may require a small clarified target behavior rather than no-op buttons hidden from UI.

phases.title: Profile, capability resolution, and verification hardening
targetScope: Migrate profile/logout flow and document placeholder profile actions.
Resolve or explicitly defer remaining platform capabilities with evidence.
Add focused target verification for core state and data behavior.
expectedTests: manual profile/logout smoke review if device available
stateDataBehavior: Logout must clear session path and return to onboarding-style entry.
Focused tests must cover startup/session/repository/detail helper logic rather than placeholder package checks only.
deferredRisks: Capability rows for file/media/permissions may end as source overrides or deferred depending on confirmed source behavior and HarmonyOS callable APIs.
If target test harness cannot run, exact blocker must be recorded and behavior proof must rely on compile/manual evidence plus pure-module tests.

implementationGroups.title: Profile page and logout flow
uiContracts: profile summary, profile cards, logout button
requiredBehaviors: Logout navigates back to onboarding/root unauthenticated path.
Placeholder profile cards remain represented or explicitly documented as product placeholders.
riskHints: Source profile data is mostly static; avoid inventing edit/profile backend behavior.
acceptanceEvidence: manual review or runtime smoke if available

implementationGroups.title: Capability resolution and focused verification
dataContracts: target-side test coverage for startup/session/repository/detail state behaviors
requiredBehaviors: Close capability rows with direct API, platform replacement, fallback, or deferred evidence as appropriate.
Replace template example tests with focused behavior coverage.
riskHints: Several capability rows are probably static-analysis false positives and should be narrowed by source override rather than bulk deferred.
acceptanceEvidence: documented capability evidence in implementation sessions

deferred.item: Exact closure status of file/media/permission/background capability rows
deferred.reason: Static analysis over-detects these capabilities across many source files; implementation sessions must confirm real user-visible behavior before choosing direct, replaced, fallback, or deferred status.
deferred.validationNeeded: Source-confirmed capability review plus HarmonyOS/Cangjie API evidence.

deferred.reason: Main planning session must first establish valid plan artifacts; row-level backfill should be done in a separate narrow records-only session.
deferred.validationNeeded: Run a follow-up planning-phase-backfill session using the phase and implementation group ids from this plan.

deferred.item: Automated UI verification for pager/tab-heavy surfaces if harness is limited
deferred.reason: Target HarmonyOS/Cangjie test harness capability is not yet confirmed for page-level UI automation.
deferred.validationNeeded: Attempt `cjpm test`; if blocked, record harness blocker and keep manual smoke targets explicit.

analysisGaps.detail: plan-seed reports missing `kotlin-analysis/analysis.json`, `kotlin-analysis/locations.json`, and `android-analysis/behavior-spec.md`, but those files are present and were read during planning. Treat seed warnings as stale metadata.

Seed and capability reports broadly tag file access, media library, image viewer gestures, runtime permissions, and background/platform components across many files that inspected source code does not clearly use directly. Confirm per source flow before records closure.
